title: Loot Equipment│掠奪裝備
description: It is easier to loot equipment from mobs.│從生物身上掠奪裝備更加容易。
body:
# Function│功能
- When mobs die in any way, there is a 20% chance that they will drop their equipment, and the durability of the dropped equipment will not change randomly.│生物以任何方式死亡後，20%概率掉落身上裝備，且掉落的裝備的耐久度不會隨機變動。
- Entering `/data modify storage loot_equipment:storage chance set value <chance>` allows you to set the drop rate of equipment.│輸入`/data modify storage loot_equipment:storage chance set value <chance>`可以設定裝備的掉落概率。
   - `<chance>`: Numerical values, range 0-1.│`<chance>`：數值，範圍0-1。
